overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a yellow hard hat walking through a futuristic urban environment. The character moves from a shadowed graffiti-covered walkway into a sunlit street with industrial buildings, billboards, and moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: walking along the enclosed graffiti-covered walkway between concrete pillars

entered.detail: concrete wall covered with colorful spray paint tags in red, blue, and white
large vertical support pillars creating a corridor effect
pedestrian signal showing green walk symbol

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed walkway lined with concrete pillars and extensive colorful graffiti. The area is shadowed and sheltered from direct sunlight, with a gritty urban atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban sidewalk along Kennedy Avenue

events.description: exits the covered graffiti walkway into bright open street
lighting shifts from shadowed to bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk next to a busy street, passing by street signs and billboards

notable_agents.action: woman in brown dress walking toward the camera
silver sedan driving along the street

entered.detail: yellow street sign reading 'Kennedy Ave' mounted on a black pole
large rotating billboard on an orange support pillar showing advertisements
tall smokestacks emitting white steam in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the enclosed walkway onto a sunlit sidewalk along Kennedy Avenue. A large billboard and industrial smokestacks are visible in the distance as vehicles pass by on the multi-lane street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban street with overhead traffic structures

events.description: red van and other vehicles pass by on the left
character maintains steady walking pace along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past other pedestrians and street infrastructure

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk
red van driving past on the street

entered.detail: large metal overhead structure spanning the road with orange lighting
red and white striped concrete barriers separating sidewalk from street
tall cylindrical industrial building with external piping

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the busy sidewalk with the graffiti wall still on the right. Overhead traffic gantries and industrial towers dominate the skyline as various vehicles pass by on the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic lights and industrial scaffolding

events.description: approaching intersection with traffic lights showing red
large industrial tower becomes prominent on the left

agents.ego_description: walking through the intersection area while observing traffic signals

notable_agents.action: person standing against the graffiti wall
green truck driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large overhead structure with traffic signals and orange lighting
metal construction scaffolding attached to the industrial building
large digital screen displaying red advertisement content

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and crosses through a busy intersection with traffic lights and overhead gantries. A large industrial tower with scaffolding rises prominently on the left as digital billboards display advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street corner with tall tower structure

events.description: passing the corner with the large industrial tower

agents.ego_description: walking past the industrial tower toward a group of pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead near the corner

entered.detail: concrete building facade at the street corner
tall modern buildings visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues past the industrial tower and approaches a street corner where several pedestrians are gathered. The graffiti-covered wall continues alongside the sidewalk as the urban landscape extends toward distant skyscrapers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character transitions from a shadowed, gritty alleyway into a bright, sprawling industrial cityscape. It begins within a narrow enclosed walkway lined with concrete pillars and colorful graffiti, moving through the sheltered gloom of the urban corridor. As the character emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens onto the sunlit sidewalk of Kennedy Avenue, where the lighting shifts abruptly to reveal passing vehicles, distant smokestacks, and towering billboards. The camera then tracks along the busy street, passing under overhead traffic gantries and beside a massive industrial tower with scaffolding before crossing a bustling intersection filled with digital advertisements. Finally, the movement continues past a gathering of pedestrians at a street corner, with the graffiti-covered wall trailing off as the landscape extends toward distant skyscrapers.
